focus: [MON-B9/D6] designer-skills-main residual build/visual craft: observation-triad, decision-rationale, accessibility-coverage, and naming/documentation lint as conditional sk-design proof lanes

graphEvents.label: designer-skills-main adds a neutral observation/problem/fix audit shape that can become a checkable sk-design finding schema
designer-skills-main design-rationale supplies alternatives/tradeoffs/validation fields missing from the current four-field sk-design proof card
designer-skills-main accessibility testing splits readiness into automated/manual/assistive/user layers rather than one generic accessibility dimension
designer-skills-main design-system naming and documentation templates can become conditional lintable artifact contracts
sk-design READY/adoption claims should require conditional proof lanes keyed to the claim type and produced artifact

label: Audit findings need neutral Observation before Problem/Fix so evidence can be replayed separately from judgment
enforceable: Require observation/problem/fix/status fields in audit findings and fixture transcripts; optionally add proof_check --require-observation-triad.
advisory: Whether the observation is the most important visual fact remains design judgment.

label: Major design decisions need a conditional rationale proof field with alternatives, evidence, trade-offs, and validation plan
enforceable: Check rationale schema, sourceProofs, optionsConsidered, tradeoffs, validationPlan, and proof-card linkage for major design decisions.
advisory: The quality of the reasoning and chosen option remains design judgment.

label: Accessibility READY claims need explicit coverage layers, not only a generic audit evidence dimension
enforceable: Require ACCESSIBILITY COVERAGE fields for automated, keyboard, screen-reader, zoom/reflow, high-contrast, reduced-motion, assistive-tech, and user-testing statuses when accessibility-ready is claimed.
advisory: Actual assistive-technology usability remains advisory unless real AT/user tests were run and cited.

label: Token/component/library outputs need conditional naming and documentation completeness lint
enforceable: Validate naming regexes, token tiers, required design-system doc headings, status fields, and fixture transcripts for design-system artifact outputs.
advisory: Whether a name is semantically best or product-appropriate remains review judgment.

label: sk-design final proof should support conditional proof lanes keyed to claim type and artifact type, not only one global four-field proof card
impeccable has problem/fix critique examples, so the fresh designer delta is the neutral observation proof slot rather than problem/fix itself

direction: Treat problem/fix critique as novel from designer-skills-main
reason: impeccable already contains problem/fix critique examples; only the neutral observation slot plus per-dimension status is a fresh proof-shape delta.
